name: ktz-digital-twin
description: KTZ hackathon — Locomotive Digital Twin (monorepo): ingest, history, WebSocket, cockpit UI

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,sim,ml -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @ktz/backend" "npm run dev -w @ktz/frontend" "npm run dev -w @ktz/simulator" "npm run serve -w @ktz/ml"
scripts.dev:no-ml: concurrently -n backend,frontend,sim -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @ktz/backend" "npm run dev -w @ktz/frontend" "npm run dev -w @ktz/simulator"
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @ktz/backend" "npm run dev -w @ktz/frontend"
